dict.string: PageFly Capture reads the focused app, window title, and visible text via macOS Accessibility to build your personal work log. Password fields are always skipped.
PageFly Capture uses your microphone only when you start a recording, to capture your voice during meetings for later transcription on your server.
PageFly Capture taps system audio via ScreenCaptureKit only when you start a recording, to include the other side of your meetings in the transcription. No screenshots are taken.
